title: Dipterostele minutiflora
taxonomy: Dipterostele minutiflora belongs to the family of flowering plants known as orchids. Specifically, it is classified within the subfamily Orchidoideae and is a member of the genus Dipterostele. Dipterostele minutiflora is a type of orchid that is native to Africa and is characterized by its small flowers and delicate appearance. The species is classified as a terrestrial orchid, meaning it grows in the ground rather than in trees. Within the Orchidoideae subfamily, Dipterostele minutiflora is one of several species that are endemic to the continent of Africa.
